extraction.one_line_summary: BENNETT Sam won the sprint after breakaway caught inside final kilometer, holding off Gaviria, Kristoff, Kittel, and Matthews in bunch finish.
tactical_patterns: Kittel launched sprint early without teammates in position, allowing Bennett to time counterpunch perfectly from chaotic scramble.
Sagan burned excessive energy fighting for wheels without teammates, exposing positional weakness when Bora-Hansgrohe absent from leadout.
Breakaway caught with under 1km remaining after bridge crossing rise disrupted sprint train organization, creating scrappy finale.

rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: positive: Won against world-class field without organized leadout, showing superior positioning instincts in chaotic finale.
rider_signals.KITTEL Marcel: negative: Initiated sprint prematurely without teammates, suggesting either tactical miscalculation or diminished top-end speed requiring early jump.
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: negative: Wasted energy finding wheels without Bora support, revealing vulnerability when left without team structure in sprint chaos.
rider_signals.COMBO Roman: neutral: Fully committed to breakaway survival with Latour until final kilometer, no tactical retreat despite inevitable catch.
